About Archivable
The world's permanent community archive
What is Archivable?

Archivable is a permanent, community-verified archive for documents, records and artefacts that deserve to exist forever. From residential floor plans to historical legal records, from family trees to iconic cultural moments — Archivable preserves them permanently and makes them freely accessible to everyone.

Browse and explore the archive freely without an account. Create a free account to view documents inline, download full resolution originals, upload your own documents, and earn the Origin badge as the first contributor of any record.

How It Works
🔍
Discover
Browse categories or search the archive freely — no account needed.
📄
Read Online
Members view every document inline — images, PDFs, and records — right in the browser.
📥
Download
Join free to download full resolution originals. 30 seconds to sign up.
📤
Contribute
Upload documents to preserve them permanently. Earn the Origin badge.
✓
Verify
The community votes on authenticity. The best content rises to the top.
Built to Last

Every document uploaded to Archivable is stored using distributed file storage and secured on the Avalanche blockchain — making records tamper-proof, permanent, and impossible to lose. The technology runs quietly in the background. You just use the archive.
